import pytest
from appium.webdriver.common.appiumby import AppiumBy
from reportportal_client import step

from driver.driver_actions import DriverActions


@pytest.mark.name("test_case")
def test_test_case(actions: DriverActions):
    with step("[Verify] Capture 'screenshot' before screenshot"):
        actions.capture_for_preview('screenshot', 'before', AppiumBy.ACCESSIBILITY_ID, 'EditingImageView_ImageView')
    with step("[Verify] Screenshot comparisons"):
        actions.run_screenshot_comparisons(threshold=0.95)
    assert True

import pytest
from appium.webdriver.common.appiumby import AppiumBy
from reportportal_client import step

from driver.driver_actions import DriverActions


@pytest.mark.name("test_case")
def test_test_case(actions: DriverActions):
    with step("[Action] Long press ic edit compare n at (69.0%, 51.7%)"):
        actions.long_press_within_element(AppiumBy.ACCESSIBILITY_ID, 'ic edit compare n', 69.0, 51.7, duration=1.0, container_by=AppiumBy.XPATH, container_value='//XCUIElementTypeOther[@name="EditViewController"]/XCUIElementTypeOther[2]/XCUIElementTypeOther[2]/XCUIElementTypeOther/XCUIElementTypeScrollView', container_w=320, container_h=476)
    assert True
step_002_t5:
import pytest
from appium.webdriver.common.appiumby import AppiumBy
from reportportal_client import step

from driver.driver_actions import DriverActions


@pytest.mark.name("test_case")
def test_test_case(actions: DriverActions):
    with step("[Verify] Capture 'screenshot' after screenshot"):
        actions.capture_for_preview('screenshot', 'after', AppiumBy.ACCESSIBILITY_ID, 'EditingImageView_ImageView', expected_result='different', threshold=0.95)
    with step("[Verify] Screenshot comparisons"):
        actions.run_screenshot_comparisons(threshold=0.95)
    assert True
